text.more:
This interactive network visualizes the comprehensive industry footprint of Oceanus Folk artist Sailor Shift. Generated using a 2nd-Degree Ego-Network filter, this graph captures both her immediate sphere and her broader ripple effect across the music ecosystem.

How to read this graph:

  • 1st-Degree (Direct): Artists connected directly to Sailor Shift. This includes her intimate circle of studio collaborators, as well as the initial wave of artists who directly cited her as a stylistic inspiration.
  • 2nd-Degree (Indirect): The expansive outer network. This captures the 'ripple effect'—artists who collaborated with her bandmates, or younger musicians who were inspired by the artists she originally influenced.

Together, this unfiltered view demonstrates how a single artist operates as a 'Super-Hub,' bridging distinct communities and permanently altering the trajectory of their genre.
text.intro: Use the mouse wheel to zoom and click and drag to pan across the network.
text.title: A 2nd-degree ego-network mapping the complete professional and creative footprint of Sailor Shift.
